brand.name: Memorialize
brand.heroTitle: Turn people, stories, and emotions into unforgettable 3D gifts.
brand.heroSubtitle: Create a profile, preview AI concepts, approve your favorite design, and get it printed + delivered with premium finishing.

howItWorks.title: Create Gift Profile
howItWorks.desc: Add recipient name, occasion, personality, hobbies, style, and references.

howItWorks.title: AI Concept Generation
howItWorks.desc: Get multiple gift previews in different artistic and material styles.

howItWorks.title: Approve & Print
howItWorks.desc: Select one concept, finalize details, and we start production on demand.

howItWorks.title: Ship & Surprise
howItWorks.desc: Track your order and deliver a deeply personal gift experience.

categories.name: People Portrait Models
categories.desc: High-detail miniatures based on photos, vibe, and story context.

categories.name: Team Farewell Gifts
categories.desc: Custom desk-ready pieces for promotions, exits, and milestone recognitions.

categories.name: Anniversary Keepsakes
categories.desc: Romantic, playful, or elegant styles with engraved bases and message cards.

categories.name: Birthday & Parents Day
categories.desc: Emotion-first designs with optional premium packaging and handwritten notes.

categories.name: Pet Memorial Sculpts
categories.desc: Sensitive, beautiful physical mementos to preserve loving memories.

categories.name: Limited Edition Themes
categories.desc: Festival and seasonal designs: Diwali, New Year, Wedding season, and more.

testimonials.name: Rhea Kapoor
testimonials.quote: I cried when I saw the final print. It looked exactly like my dad in his favorite pose.

testimonials.name: Sarthak Jain
testimonials.quote: The AI previews were so good we had a hard time picking just one.

testimonials.name: Neha & Arjun
testimonials.quote: Best anniversary gift we’ve done. Packaging and finish felt luxury-level.

faq.a: Most orders are delivered in 5–8 business days, depending on complexity and location.

faq.q: Can I request edits after AI preview?
faq.a: Yes. You can request refinements before approving the final print-ready design.
PLA+, resin-style finish, matte paint options, and premium base engraving.
You can support prepaid, partial advance, or COD policies based on your operations.

stories.title: Chef Marco Tribute
stories.text: A restaurant team created a custom piece with chef coat details and a plated signature dish base.

stories.title: Dr. Ananya’s Milestone
stories.text: Family gifted a stethoscope-themed figurine with a motivational engraved quote.

stories.title: Athlete Rohan Edition
stories.text: Friends selected an energetic action pose with team-color accents for his 25th birthday.

stories.title: First Dance Moment
stories.text: A couple transformed their wedding dance photo into a sculptural keepsake.

about.mission: Memorialize exists to make gifting deeply personal, visual, and unforgettable through AI-assisted design and premium on-demand 3D production.

values.title: Emotion First
values.desc: Every design starts with story and sentiment, not just surface-level aesthetics.

values.title: Craft + Speed
values.desc: Fast iteration using AI with careful human review before production.

values.title: Premium Experience
values.desc: From concept preview to unboxing, every touchpoint is built for delight.
